composition.means: vessel grafting from chest wall or leg

plain_language.en: Heart bypass surgery using blood vessels (CABG)
plain_language.es: Bypass cardíaco coronario con injerto de vasos sanguíneos (CABG)
plain_language.fr: Pontage aorto-coronarien par greffe de vaisseaux (Pontage)
plain_language.ar: عملية مجازة الشريان التاجي للقلب (ترقيع الشرايين)
plain_language.hi: हृदय की धमनियों की बाईपास ग्राफ्टिंग सर्जरी (सीएबीजी)
plain_language.zh: 冠状动脉旁路移植造血管重建术 (心脏搭桥 CABG)
plain_language.pt: Bypass cardíaco coronário com enxerto de vasos sanguíneos

notes: Coronary artery bypass graft (CABG), arterial bypass, 3 coronary artery grafts.
